generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know? Many of our allies are already stepping up to share the burden of national security. By supporting strategic autonomy, we're not just protecting ourselves—we're joining a growing movement of nations working together for a safer world. Let's keep building on this progress! #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
